overview: A premium product landing page for the PESOMA Under Sink Organizer, featuring interactive 3D product visualization, smooth animations, and a stunning design matching homeessentials.in's brand colors. Showcases the 2-tier expandable cabinet shelf organizer with full product details and a 3-year guarantee banner.
features: Interactive 3D product model with rotation and zoom
Animated hero section with 3-year guarantee banner
Framer Motion scroll animations and micro-interactions
3D-styled buttons with depth and hover effects
Responsive layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Sticky header with Add to Cart CTA
